reviews.review_title: Beautiful game, needs some tweaks IMHO
reviews.review_description:
This is an engaging platformer game with fresh ideas and beautiful environments. Some things feel very "early access" and I wish they were polished to avoid triggering prejudices from those that get the game and only scratch the surface.

The most pressing things would be:
- a menu UI that isn't consistent with the rest of the looks of the game. Also, using button X for the menu instead of using the secondary Meta button is an odd  choice.
- the floating UI of the bird icon and the eggs are very annoying and I'd replace them by something on the wrist.
- rotating the view of the player when standing on a rotating platform is an invitation to motion sickness and is bad practice that should be avoided (and it is easy to avoid!)
- the mechanics of the 1st big boss were counterintuitive. I died 10 times trying to reach the shore (perfectly possible) before I realised I was supposed to wait on the wooden platform and dodge the obstacles. The fact that I could only push one boulder at the time felt artificial and silly as well.
- on the matter of reaching the shore, there are other parts in the maps where I die trying to reach a part of the map I'm not supposed to visit. This feels wrong in a game that encourages you to explore looking for easter eggs and secret places.
- the floating stick selection icons appear in an odd location too far from the current position of the hand. This gets annoying when you want to change sticks mid-air.
- I wish we didnt have to press the trigger to use the bounce sticks. IMHO it feels unnecessary.
- I wish the control of the player's position when the magnet stick is attached used the natural motion of the arm (like in any climbing game) instead of the thumbstick. It feels like wasting one of the great things of VR.
- the narrative felt very strange at the beginning of the game: your partner is kidnapped by a dragon... therefore you have to roam a psychedelic world collecting easter eggs. I don't understand! And I wish you used better voice acting in that intro because it gives a poor impression about the game.

This above may sound negative so let me insist on the strengths of the game: I loved the spiral of houses floating in the air and the tower climb in the 2nd level. I also love the combination of the bouncing stick and the magnet. I felt very good when jumping from platform to platform inside the tower, it felt great! I think this game has potential and one can feel the love and dedication that has been invested in it.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you very much for such a thoughtful review! I truly appreciate your opinion and the time you spent playing the game!

reviews.review_description: Nice game but it wont let me play co-op with my friend.  Just keeps saying lobby not available. Still not working for us just says unable to join lobby.

developer_response.body:
Hello! I’m very glad that you enjoyed our game, and at the same time I’m sorry to hear that you experienced issues with the co-op mode.

I know this problem can occasionally occur because our game has a very small player base, and our server provider does not keep a dedicated server running at all times. As a result, sometimes you may need to restart the game a few times before a server is allocated for your co-op session.

Could you and your friend please try restarting the game several times and let us know whether you were eventually able to play together? Your feedback would be greatly appreciated.

reviews.review_description: If you enjoy platformers this is a unique game that only works in VR.  If you're looking for something that is totally different yet fun and challenging this game is worth a go.  I love when Devs try something totally different from all the norms and it works.  This is an experience that will stick with you and should have more attention.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! We’re very glad that you enjoyed our game!

reviews.review_description:
I was hooked by the game mechanics as soon as I started playing. This game provides a unique challenge, fun traversal, and beautiful, fairy tale-like visuals. The environments are so rich that they will make your head spin and fill your journey with wonder. 
There is a ton of content, collectibles, and secrets. The game feels so fresh! There are various in-game wands (sticks) to help you on your adventure. Jumper mace is my favorite.
It's a truly magical experience! Highly recommended!

A true adventure in a magical world full of secrets! I especially loved the boss fight in the mushroom forest😏
As for the downsides, I'd note the lack of a seated mode, so hope it will be added soon.
